stemHtml: The Minimum Equipment List (MEL) defines the equipment which can be inoperative when undertaking a flight and the additional procedures under which this allowance can be accepted. The MEL shall be drawn up by…

options.a: the operator and may NOT be less restrictive than the Master Minimum Equipment List (MMEL)
options.b: the manufacturer and may be less restrictive than the Master Minimum equipment List (MMEL)
options.c: the operator and may be less restrictive than the Master Minimum equipment List (MMEL)
options.d: the manufacturer and may be more restrictive than the Master Minimum Equipment List (MMEL)
